title: lastrea oligophlebia var. elegans
intro: Lastrea oligophlebia var. elegans, also known as the elegant fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lastrea oligophlebia var. elegans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
